---
title: "Adaptive Optimal Control of Nonlinear Systems with Multiple Time-Scale Eligibility Traces"
authors:
  - "J. Rao"
  - "J. Wang"
  - "J. Xu"
  - "Shunyu Wu"
year: 2023
venue: "62nd IEEE Conference on Decision and Control (CDC)"
status: "published"
type: "co-author"
doi: "10.1109/CDC49753.2023.10383316"
url: "https://doi.org/10.1109/CDC49753.2023.10383316"
keywords:
  - "adaptive optimal control"
  - "eligibility traces"
  - "nonlinear systems"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** Published (Conference Proceedings)  
**DOI:** [10.1109/CDC49753.2023.10383316](https://doi.org/10.1109/CDC49753.2023.10383316)

Selected conference collaboration on adaptive optimal control with multiple time-scale eligibility traces.
